phases.title: Phase 1 — Core Gameplay Loop & Entity AI
phases.goal: Establish the fundamental mechanics of investigating, surviving, and extracting.
phases.desc: Implementing the primary dispatch call system, basic puzzle generation, and the first iteration of the stalker AI.

phases.title: Phase 2 — Audio & Atmosphere
phases.goal: Build the tension through spatial audio and dynamic lighting.
phases.desc: Integrating FMOD/Wwise for dynamic soundscapes, proximity voice chat, and reactive environment lighting.

history.title: Pre-Production Phase
history.desc: Established core game design document, mood boards, and primary gameplay loops. Selected engine and set up source control.
